repos.name: playbook-engineering
repos.note: This repository — source of the governance it describes.

repos.name: overlook
repos.note: Formerly named photos; renamed on GitHub to overlook. Historical ENG records and SOP changelogs keep the photos name (supersede-don't-rewrite). Most mature working agreement; shared baselines were extracted from it. Shared-CI adoption pending (ENG-0009 order: this repo, then overlook).

repos.name: image-trail
repos.delta: Coverage floor 71% lines / 80% branches; acceptance coverage-map update for UI/content changes.

repos.name: cartograph
repos.delta: Branch prefixes feat/ fix/ chore/ docs/; issue-before-branch; Rust gate (fmt, clippy -D warnings, test); spec/traceability artifacts in the same PR.

repos.name: bookmarkit
repos.note: Pure consumer — inherits every baseline, proving the inheritance model.

repos.name: quorum
repos.note: Pure consumer, created 2026-07-22; inherits from day one.

repos.name: agent-bot-identity
repos.note: Extracted from this repo's tools/agent-bot (ENG-0016) as a standalone, shareable tool.
